title: • Purchasing Power-Ups & Temporary Buffs
content:
• Purchasing Power-Ups & Temporary Buffs
• Resisting or Transferring Curses
• Gaining Extra Time or Revision Opportunities

✔ C. Items, Power-Ups, & Legendary Objects
• Item Categories:
• Weapons & Tools (Fictional Swords, Magic Pens, etc.)
• Artifacts & Accessories (The Monkey’s Paw, The Holy Grail, etc.)
• Consumables (Potions, Scrolls, One-Time Buffs)
• Debuffing & Cursed Items (Random Effects & Power Balancing)

✔ D. Curse System & Transfer Mechanics
• Curses must be transferred via specific items.
• Some archetypes have innate curse resistance or manipulation abilities.
• Curses can linger for multiple weeks unless countered.

✔ E. Secret & Hidden Mechanics
• Players may unlock hidden mechanics or secret abilities.
• Certain XP thresholds may reveal “forbidden” gameplay mechanics.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 430 (chunk 430/555)
